title: WIN-043 defense preemption: 2.26× ratio is verifiable + W019 reconciliation
target: WIN-043 detail_verdict_text — the dome defender can point out that the 2.26× ratio IS verifiable (our own cycle-3 work shows 2.16× over 1990–2025 km/yr window, within 5%). The stronger point is W019 self-contradiction (dome reported 5.5× lateral:poleward in REFINED notes), now added to detail_extra. The preemption should: (a) acknowledge the ratio is verifiable from NOAA data but was never predicted before measurement — the dome's monitoring only validates post-hoc; (b) surface the W019 discrepancy (2.26× vs 5.5×) as the self-contradiction, not the unverifiability. Analyst Mode 3: rewrite detail_verdict_text paragraph 1 to shift from 'unverifiable' to 'post-hoc verified but self-contradicted by W019.'
